rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §26.0061, which governs parental requests for instructional material review by school district boards.
quote: Sec. 26.0061. RIGHT TO REQUEST INSTRUCTIONAL MATERIAL REVIEW.
_note: No overlap between proposed tax homestead exemption change and this education statute on instructional material review.
